title: scleranthus perennis
intro: Scleranthus perennis, also known as the perennial knawel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Scleranthus perennis can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and calmness, and can be consumed internally or applied topically.
